title: Orchestration
excerpt: Create rules to route payments across your payment processors. Use Orchestration to route payments to multiple processors and monitor your payments performance. [Get started](https://docs.stripe.com/payments/orchestration/route-payments.md) - **Process payments on multiple processors**: Update your [PaymentIntents integration](https://docs.stripe.com/payments/orchestration/route-payments.md) to route payments to any of the Stripe-supported processors, or automatically route payments created through Billing, Checkout, Payment Links, or the Dashboard. - **Retry a payment on a different processor**: Configure rules to automatically [retry](https://docs.stripe.com/payments/orchestration/retries.md) failed payment transactions with alternative processors.…
